items.blinded_text: This market will resolve to “Yes” if Entity A resigns or is removed as Entity B or otherwise ceases to be the Entity B of the Federation A for any period of time by relative-date-1 , specified-time ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”. An announcement of Entity A's resignation/removal before this market's end date will immediately resolve this market to "Yes[identifying quotation removed]Yes" resolution. The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of credible reporting.

question: Entity A out as Entity B by relative-date-1 ?
